title: Goodbye South, Goodbye
overview: In this portrait of small-time hoods rendered in rhythm-of-life anecdotal detail, Gao is the leader of a circle of layabouts including his sidekick, Flathead, and their girlfriends, Pretzel and Ling. He is also the originator of petty crime schemes, which promise to get the gang nowhere fast.

trailers.title: Hou Hsiao-Hsien’s GOODBYE SOUTH, GOODBYE | Sat Sept 15, 2018 | AFS Cinema
